headline: Michael Burry ditches GameStop stake after buyout offer to eBay
summary: The "Big Short" investor Michael Burry sold his stake in GameStop (GME) after the video game retailer's CEO Ryan Cohen proposed a $56 billion buyout offer to e-commerce giant eBay (EBAY) earlier this week. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland react to these headlines and invest reactions.

content.title: Michael Burry ditches GameStop stake after buyout offer to eBay
content.description:
The "Big Short" investor Michael Burry sold his stake in GameStop (GME) after the video game retailer's CEO Ryan Cohen proposed a $56 billion buyout offer to e-commerce giant eBay (EBAY) earlier this week.

Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland react to these headlines and invest reactions.
content.summary: The "Big Short" investor Michael Burry sold his stake in GameStop (GME) after the video game retailer's CEO Ryan Cohen proposed a $56 billion buyout offer to e-commerce giant eBay (EBAY) earlier this week. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland react to these headlines and invest reactions.

headline: GameStop's $55B eBay bid could liquidate its bitcoin
summary: GameStop submitted an unsolicited $55.5 billion offer to buy eBay, and CEO Ryan Cohen hasn't ruled out selling the company's $368 million bitcoin treasury to fund it. If the deal closes, eBay's 135 million active buyers would be inside a company that holds bitcoin. CoinDesk's Jennifer Sanasie hosts "CoinDesk Daily."

headline: GameStop's $56 billion pursuit of eBay stirs social media hype and doubts
summary: GameStop's $56 billion bid for eBay ignited intense debate on social media, as retail investors ‌greeted the potential deal with a mix of ‌excitement, skepticism and meme-stock humor.  • Top comments on Reddit were split ​between enthusiasm over the e-commerce giant that such a merger would create, and skepticism about how GameStop would finance such a large deal.  • Some users supported the rationale of combining ‌GameStop's loyal retail ⁠base with eBay's online reach, arguing the deal could create a formidable digital commerce player.

content.title: GameStop's $56 billion pursuit of eBay stirs social media hype and doubts

headline: GameStop makes daring $56 billion bid for eBay, hoping to rival Amazon
summary: GameStop has offered to buy ecommerce giant eBay for $55.5 billion, a tie-up that the video game retailer’s boss believes could produce a “legit competitor” to Amazon.

content.title: GameStop makes daring $56 billion bid for eBay, hoping to rival Amazon
content.summary: GameStop has offered to buy ecommerce giant eBay for $55.5 billion, a tie-up that the video game retailer’s boss believes could produce a “legit competitor” to Amazon.

thumbnail.caption: GameStop wants to buy eBay for $55.5bn to create a 'legit competitor to Amazon.' EBay's headquarters in San Jose, California. - Justin Sullivan/Getty Images

headline: GameStop GME Eyes $55.5B eBay Takeover: $368M Bitcoin Treasury in Danger?
summary: GameStop submitted a non-binding $55.5 billion offer to acquire eBay at $125 per share on Sunday, proposing to fund the deal with $9.4 billion in cash and liquid investments plus up to $20 billion in financing backed by TD Securities. The bid represents a 46% premium to eBay’s share price ...

The bid represents a 46% premium to eBay’s share price ...

headline: Michael Burry dumps GameStop stock after eBay bid
summary: Burry said the deal's leverage — potentially 7.7 times debt to EBITDA — was incompatible with his "Instant Berkshire" thesis

content.title: Michael Burry dumps GameStop stock after eBay bid
content.summary: Burry said the deal's leverage — potentially 7.7 times debt to EBITDA — was incompatible with his "Instant Berkshire" thesis

headline: Hertz Car Sales Continues Retail Expansion with Digital Showroom on eBay
summary: ESTERO, Fla., May 05, 2026--Hertz Car Sales today announced the latest strategic expansion of its digital retail presence with eBay, bringing thousands of Hertz Certified, near-new vehicles to one of the world’s largest online automotive marketplaces. Through a dedicated Hertz Car Sales showroom, shoppers on eBay will have access to more than 8,000 vehicle listings, enjoying greater confidence, convenience, and value backed by a trusted brand.

content.title: Hertz Car Sales Continues Retail Expansion with Digital Showroom on eBay

headline: PayPal’s (NASDAQ:PYPL) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
summary: Digital payments platform PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $8.35 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.34 per share was 5.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: PayPal’s (NASDAQ:PYPL) Q1 CY2026 Sales Beat Estimates
content.summary: Digital payments platform PayPal (NASDAQ:PYPL) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $8.35 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.34 per share was 5.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
